subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sent forth the Messengers, verily there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed is he who hath found [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ارسل الرسل علی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم طوبی لمن وجد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
